gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.PLT > 100 AND T2.PLT < 400 AND T1.Diagnosis IS NOT NULL

question: Among the patients who have a normal platelet level, how many of them have other symptoms observed?
